zh.lifeSummary: Crisli verch Morgan是Malt Morgan和Mrs. Malt Morgan的女兒，於1338年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾特雷德爾 曼諾 在 代福瑞。她與Jenkin Kemeys在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世在威爾士格拉莫爾根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Crisli verch Morgan是Malt Morgan和Mrs. Malt Morgan的女儿，于1338年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾特雷德爾 曼諾 在 代福瑞。她与Jenkin Kemeys在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世在威尔士格拉莫爾根。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): from the medieval Welsh personal name Morgan, Morgant (Old Welsh Morcant, of uncertain etymology).
Irish: importation of the Welsh surname (see 1 above), to which has been assimilated more than one Gaelic surname, notably Ó Muireagáin (see Merrigan ).
Scottish: probably from a Gaelic personal name cognate with Welsh Morcant.

variants.name: Merrigan
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireagáin ‘descendant of Muireagán’ a personal name derived from muir ‘sea’. Compare Morgan , with which this name has been confused.

variants.name: Morgans
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): variant of Morgan , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Crisli
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Nunzio, Salvatore, Aniello, Carmine, Cirino, Clemente, Domenico, Giuseppe, Maddalena, Nicoletta, Rocco.
(southern): habitational name from a place so named in the province of Caserta.

variants.name: Criscione
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Carmelo, Antonio, Carmine, Emanuele, Ignazio, Natale, Sal.

variants.name: Cresci
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Dino, Aldo, Carlo, Domenic, Leno, Nino.
Italian: from the personal name Cresci (or Crescio), which is in part a short form of Crescenzio (see Crescenzo ), and in part an omen or well-wishing name on its own.

en.lifeSummary: Crisli verch Morgan was born in 1338, in Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire, Wales as the daughter of Malt Morgan and Mrs. Malt Morgan. She married Jenkin Kemeys in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in Glamorgan, Wales.

ja.lifeSummary: Crisli verch Morganは1338年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアトレデグイル マノー イン ディフリンでMalt MorganとMrs. Malt Morganの娘として生まれた。イギリスウェールズグラモーガンでJenkin Kemeysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はウェールズグラモーガンで死去した。

ko.Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire: 웨일스 몬모우스실르 트레데그이르 먼어 인 디프린
ko.lifeSummary: Crisli verch Morgan(은)는 1338년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 트레데그이르 먼어 인 디프린에서 Malt Morgan(와)과 Mrs. Malt Morgan의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 Jenkin Kemeys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 웨일스 글램르건에서 사망했다.

ru.Tredegyr Manor in Dyffryn, Monmouthshire: тредегир манор ин диффрин, монмоутшир, Уэльс
ru.lifeSummary: Crisli verch Morgan родилась в 1338 г. в местности тредегир манор ин диффрин, монмоутшир, Уэльс. Её родителей звали Malt Morgan и Mrs. Malt Morgan. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jenkin Kemeys в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности глэморган, Уэльс.
